message:
Add obligation ledger WASM parity verification tests (umelq.6.3)

33 tests proving obligation accounting is fully wasm32-compatible:
- Abstract Time: lifecycle, large gaps, zero-base, non-epoch sources
- BTreeMap determinism: ID monotonicity, reproducible drain ordering
- Cancel drain: completeness, partial completion, abort reason preservation
- Host interruption: tab suspension mid-obligation, suspension during drain
- Multi-region isolation: sibling region safety, cross-region task isolation
- Graded obligations: commit/abort/into_raw/leak-panic parity
- GradedScope: clean lifecycle, leak detection, double-resolution guard
- Leak oracle: multi-kind detection, mark_leaked diagnostics
- Full browser lifecycle simulation (fetch/ws/idb regions)
- Stress test: 200 obligations across 10 regions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
